Home / Services / Subfloor Preparation & Leveling

Subfloor Preparation & Leveling

Ensure a solid foundation for your new floors with our expert subfloor preparation services.

A proper subfloor is crucial for the longevity and performance of any flooring installation. In Baltimore, with its older homes and shifting clay soils, subfloor preparation is especially important. Alvaro's Floors LLC provides expert subfloor preparation and leveling services to ensure a solid foundation for your new floors.

We inspect your existing subfloor for damage, unevenness, and moisture. We repair or replace damaged subfloor panels, level uneven surfaces with self-leveling compounds, and install moisture barriers to protect against water damage. We use the latest tools and techniques to ensure a smooth, level, and dry subfloor.

Investing in proper subfloor preparation will prevent future flooring problems, such as squeaks, cracks, and uneven surfaces. Contact Alvaro's Floors LLC for a free consultation and let us prepare your subfloor for a beautiful and long-lasting flooring installation.

Our Process

  1. 01 Step 1: Subfloor Inspection and Assessment
  2. 02 Step 2: Damage Repair and Replacement
  3. 03 Step 3: Leveling and Smoothing
  4. 04 Step 4: Moisture Barrier Installation

Benefits

  • Ensured Flooring Longevity
  • Prevention of Flooring Problems
  • Improved Flooring Performance
  • Enhanced Home Value

Frequently Asked Questions

Why is subfloor preparation important?

Subfloor preparation ensures a level, stable, and dry foundation for your new floors, preventing future problems and extending their lifespan.

How do I know if my subfloor needs repair?

Signs of subfloor damage include uneven surfaces, squeaks, cracks, and moisture stains.

Can you prepare a subfloor for any type of flooring?

Yes, we can prepare a subfloor for any type of flooring, including hardwood, laminate, vinyl, and tile.

Get a Free Estimate
